title: Supplementary Information Tables 2024-25 Departmental Plan: Health Canada - Canada.ca
content:
## Supplementary Information Tables 2024-25 Departmental Plan: Health Canada
- Details on Transfer Payment Programs
- Gender-Based Analysis Plus
- Renewal of the funding for the existing Federal Framework for the Legalization and Regulation of Cannabis in Canada (Horizontal Initiative)
- Renewed Canadian Drugs and Substances Strategy (Horizontal Initiatives)
